items.name: player
items.title: Player
items.description: First/third-person character controller (ecctrl wrapper).

items.name: portal
items.title: Portal
items.description: A travel gate: a glowing sensor ring that fires onEnter (or navigates to a destination) when the avatar or a vehicle passes through — for world-to-world travel, level transitions, and teleports.

items.name: compass
items.title: Compass
items.description: A screen-fixed HUD compass: a glassy dial in a corner of the canvas whose rose card swings with the camera heading, with a fixed lubber line and an optional wind + bearing readout — works with any traversal that drives the camera (on foot or at a vehicle's chase-cam).

items.name: terrain
items.title: Terrain
items.description: Procedural fbm-displaced ground with a matching trimesh collider, a flat build-pad option, and an optional radial island falloff.

items.name: room
items.title: Room
items.description: Four walls + floor with a doorway and fixed colliders; optional roof.

items.name: house
items.title: House
items.description: Composed dwelling: walls with openings, floor, roof, door, and windows.

items.name: hut
items.title: Hut
items.description: A round hut: a post-ribbed wall on a stone base, a framed doorway and window, under a shaggy thatch cone; one cylinder collider.

items.name: wall
items.title: Wall
items.description: Wall segment with door/window openings and a fixed collider.

items.name: floor
items.title: Floor
items.description: Flat floor slab with a fixed collider.

items.name: roof
items.title: Roof
items.description: Flat or gable roof.

items.name: door
items.title: Door
items.description: Door panel within a frame.

items.name: window
items.title: Window
items.description: Window with frame and translucent pane.

items.name: staircase
items.title: Staircase
items.description: Stepped staircase with per-step colliders.

items.name: stool
items.title: Stool
items.description: A round bar stool: a disc seat on three splayed legs; a thin cylinder collider.

items.name: table
items.title: Table
items.description: Table with a top and four legs.

items.name: tent
items.title: Tent
items.description: An A-frame ridge tent: striped wind-rippled fabric, entrance flaps pinned open, guy ropes and stakes; solid sides and back, open front.

items.name: chair
items.title: Chair
items.description: Chair with seat, back, and legs.

items.name: counter
items.title: Counter
items.description: A service / bar counter: a solid body under a worktop that overhangs the front; one cuboid collider.

items.name: clock
items.title: Clock
items.description: Procedural analog wall clock; hands track the system clock or a given IANA timezone.

items.name: sign
items.title: Sign
items.description: In-world text rendered in a world font (the one font-using component); falls back to the default bundled in @runek/core.

items.name: signpost
items.title: Signpost
items.description: A wooden post-and-plank signboard carrying a name in the world's display font; the post sits behind the board so the text reads clean.

items.name: lamp
items.title: Lamp
items.description: Lamp that emits a point light.

items.name: rug
items.title: Rug
items.description: Procedural striped rug (seeded stripes, no textures).

items.name: shelf
items.title: Shelf
items.description: Wall shelf with planks.

items.name: bookshelf
items.title: Bookshelf
items.description: Procedurally generated bookshelf with seeded books and one cuboid collider.

items.name: lake
items.title: Lake
items.description: Procedural animated-shader water surface (no textures); place its surface at or below ground level.

items.name: ocean
items.title: Ocean
items.description: Camera-following animated-shader ocean that reaches the world fog horizon (no textures); sits at the world ground.

items.name: shore
items.title: Shore
items.description: Sloped beach/shore strip to meet a Lake.

items.name: sailboat
items.title: Sailboat
items.description: A small procedural sailboat: a station-built low-poly hull, mast, boom, and mainsail, floating at the waterline with a gentle moored bob.

items.name: rocks
items.title: Rocks
items.description: Faceted rocks with convex-hull colliders (seeded scatter).

items.name: cliff
items.title: Cliff
items.description: A rocky promontory: a low-poly, seed-jittered truncated cone with a flattish plateau and a convex-hull collider.

items.name: sky
items.title: Sky
items.description: Procedural atmosphere (drei Sky).

items.name: grass
items.title: Grass
items.description: Instanced grass blades (seeded scatter).

items.name: trees
items.title: Trees
items.description: L-system trees grown by a 3D turtle, deterministic from seed.

items.name: lightrig
items.title: LightRig
items.description: Sun + hemisphere/ground fill with shadow configuration.

items.name: fence
items.title: Fence
items.description: Posts and rails with seeded weathering; encloses yards and paths. One footprint collider.

items.name: flag
items.title: Flag
items.description: A cloth flag on a pole; the cloth ripples per-frame, pinned at the luff. Thin pole collider.

items.name: bridge
items.title: Bridge
items.description: Plank deck spanning a gap, optionally arched, with railings and slab colliders that follow the deck.

items.name: arch
items.title: Arch
items.description: Freestanding gateway: two piers and a semicircular arch of voussoirs. Composes with Wall.

items.name: pillar
items.title: Pillar
items.description: Column with a plinth, a tapered (optionally fluted) shaft, and a capital.

items.name: well
items.title: Well
items.description: Stone well with a dark pool, posts, a little pyramid roof, and a bucket on a rope.

items.name: windmill
items.title: Windmill
items.description: A tapered tower with a conical cap and four sails that turn each frame; tower collider, seeded blade phase.

items.name: dock
items.title: Dock
items.description: A plank jetty on pilings reaching out over water; walkable deck colliders, side stringers, and seaward mooring posts.

items.name: path
items.title: Path
items.description: A meandering ribbon trail from seeded waypoints; decorative, laid just over the ground.

items.name: road
items.title: Road
items.description: A paved street: a flat stone deck with low kerbs, draped on the ground like Path; decorative (no collider).

items.name: bush
items.title: Bush
items.description: Clustered foliage blobs, seeded; the mid-height density between Grass and Trees.

items.name: flowers
items.title: Flowers
items.description: Instanced seeded wildflowers (stem + colored head) scattered over a patch.

items.name: hedge
items.title: Hedge
items.description: A trimmed green wall with seeded surface tufts; blocks like a Wall.

items.name: fountain
items.title: Fountain
items.description: Two-tier stone fountain with gently rippling water (a per-frame bob, no textures).

items.name: bench
items.title: Bench
items.description: Slatted bench with an optional backrest; indoor or outdoor seating.

items.name: bed
items.title: Bed
items.description: Bed with a frame, mattress, pillows, and a headboard.

items.name: crate
items.title: Crate
items.description: Slatted wooden crate with seeded plank shades; stacks via a cuboid collider.

items.name: barrel
items.title: Barrel
items.description: Staved barrel bellied at the middle, banded by metal hoops; convex-hull collider.

items.name: plant
items.title: Plant
items.description: Potted plant: a tapered planter and a seeded cluster of foliage.

items.name: clouds
items.title: Clouds
items.description: Drifting clouds built from clustered soft blobs (no textures); layer above a Sky.

items.name: campfire
items.title: Campfire
items.description: Stone ring, a tepee of logs, and an animated flame with a warm flickering light.

items.name: birds
items.title: Birds
items.description: A loose flock circling overhead, each bird flapping on its own seeded orbit.
